concerns.text: Constitution Principle VI (Statistical Rigor) mandates 'paired t-tests', but the plan (Section 'Summary' and 'Phase 5') specifies 'Wilcoxon signed-rank test'. This is a direct violation of the project constitution's statistical methodology requirement.

Constitution Principle VII requires recording the 'exact version identifier' of the dataset in 'data/metadata.yaml'. The plan's 'Phase 0' mentions storing a 'manifest' and 'Phase 7' generates 'manifest.yaml', but does not explicitly map the dataset version identifier to the 'data/metadata.yaml' file as required by the constitution.

Phase 3 ('Baseline Pre-training') references 'BridgeData-only' but the data-model.md and spec.md define the primary entity as 'DatasetSubset' with a 'ratio' field. The plan should explicitly reference the 'ratio=0.0' configuration defined in the data model to ensure consistency with the ablation logic in Phase 6.

The 'Statistical Test Failure' edge case states the script will 'fall back to the available seeds'. This contradicts Constitution Principle VI which requires results to be computed over 'at least five independent random seeds'. Falling back to fewer seeds violates the statistical rigor requirement unless the plan explicitly states the run is aborted or marked as invalid.
